pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 7 to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target JDK if source/target levels are not updated to match the new JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in favor of the release flag for cross-compilation and module path support in newer JDKs.
